item_specifications.special_feature: Chew Resistant, Scratch Resistant, Stain Resistant

about_item: DURABLE & CHEW-RESISTANT DESIGN – Built with reinforced stitching and tough outer fabric to handle daily scratching, digging, and chewing. A reliable crate bed option for dogs that tend to damage regular pads
WATERPROOF INNER BARRIER – Features a built-in waterproof layer that helps block accidents, spills, and moisture from soaking through, keeping crates, floors, and car seats cleaner and drier
FOR CRATES, HOME & TRAVEL USE – Designed to fit most standard crates, also works well as a floor mat or car pad for daily rest, trips, and kennel use
EMOVABLE FOAM & EASY-CLEAN COVER – Please remove the inner foam before machine washing the outer cover. Simple care routine helps maintain comfort and shape after drying
SIZE FOR SMALL & MEDIUM DOGS – Measures 35" x 22", suitable for small to medium breeds who like to stretch or curl up comfortably in crates or on the floor

authors_reviews.title: Must by for small dogs
authors_reviews.text: So far I love it. The only thing they did eat/rip off was the company name that was sew on top.
authors_reviews.author: Tonjenia L. Keen

authors_reviews.title: It is an attractive, well-made dog mat
authors_reviews.text: It is an attractive, well-made dog mat that my dog has absolutely no interest in. He's not interested in laying on it or interested in chewing it - it's crazy! I put it in his crate and he will lay on it in his crate, but he already has a memory foam pad in there that I think he likes better. This mat though is going to be great when the weather is hot. I can see that it's made of a kind of fabric that will be cool to lay on. So I'm anticipating that he will rediscover this in the summer. Another positive is that it's a perfect fit for his crate. Maybe I'll put it under the memory foam as a moisture barrier. Because it is extremely waterproof. The zipper and velcro closure is also extremely secure and well made. A really high quality product. Maybe I should have given it five stars!
authors_reviews.author: speedy eyes

authors_reviews.title: Problem solved
authors_reviews.text: My miniature poodle believes that those fluffy, filled dog pads/beds are just bit dog toys. Picture a dog that size dragging a dog bed around the house. Even better, she'll drop it at my feet and plead with me to toss it for her. This only goes on for a few days before she utterly destroys it and leaves behind all of the stuffing. Seriously, it looks like it snowed in my family room.It took me 2 stuffed dog beds to finally figure out that there was an expensive pattern here (I'm a slow learner) so I just tossed an old bath towel on the floor and gave up. But, the little imp decided it would be fun to drag that around the house and an old bath towel isn't exactly all that attractive on the floor when visitors show up.Enter this dog bed. Problem solved. Within 5 minutes of putting it on the floor she tried gnawing at one end with no success so I think I'm OK on the chewing problem. It's also heavy enough that she doesn't seem interested in dragging it around the house. Another win.She didn't use it as a bed for a few days (I removed the towel) but eventually plopped her curly haired self down and seems happy.Only problem I had was there was some off-gassing when I opened the box. I put it outside overnight and it was fine in the morning.
authors_reviews.author: JoeTAZ

authors_reviews.title: Great Pad for my dog
authors_reviews.text: I bought this crate pad for my dog who is an aggressive chewer and has destroyed a few beds in the past. This one has held up impressively—no ripping at the seams and no stuffing exposed. The surface is tough but still comfortable enough for daily naps, and it sits flat in the crate without bunching up.The waterproof layer has been a lifesaver for accidents and muddy paws—nothing soaks through to the crate tray. Cleanup is quick: I wipe it down and it’s ready to go. It also dries fast after a deeper clean, which is a big plus compared to fabric beds that stay damp and start to smell.Sizing was accurate for our small/medium crate, and the pad feels well-made for the price. If you’re tired of replacing shredded beds and want something durable, easy to clean, and truly waterproof, I’d absolutely recommend this one.• Stays in place in the crate• Durable outer material for heavy chewers (so far)• Waterproof protection makes cleanup easy• Comfortable enough for everyday use
authors_reviews.author: Liliana

authors_reviews.title: Durable and solid
authors_reviews.text: We go through dog beds on something of a schedule; seems like we can keep them for a few months and then they get destroyed. This bed appears to be heavy duty enough to hold up to my pup, and likely less interesting to destroy. We have historically gotten the somewhat puffy dog beds and I think that the edges or corners sticking up must look attractive and that's how he gets going on them. This bed seems plenty comfortable, not as puffy or soft but it also seems like it will be much less likely to attract attention to get chewed on. He's still deciding how well he likes it but I suspect he'll take to it soon as our floors are tile and while he likes laying on them when it's hot outside, the padding on this one seems like it will be dense enough to stay comfortable longer than the puffy beds and what I suspect will be my favorite feature - much easier to clean.
authors_reviews.author: Troublco

authors_reviews.title: Fantastic durability and quality
authors_reviews.text: What a great matt or dog bed for that dog that destroys everything else! My dog Archie has actually destroyed many--many dog pads that said that they would hold up. This pad is so well made and so durable that you can just see and touch it and you know that this is the pad that you have been missing. My dog loves to dig--and yes, he digs into the pad--no problem! This pad withstood not only his digging--but he also is a strong chewer, and he just got tired of trying to chew into this pad. The durability and the quality you can actually see instantly as the product is put together so perfectly. You can use this inside a crate--or do as I do and put it outside the crate, so he has something soft to lay on. It has such great padding--and is actually waterproof so it can be used outside as well. This is definitely a must have--and it should last for many years.
authors_reviews.author: hanno9660
